hf_only: Input lst must be a list
Input lst must contain hashable elements

groq_only: Order of elements in the output list may be different from the input list
Output list will not contain duplicate elements
hf_only: Output will be a list with no duplicates
Output will be a list with the same length as the input list or less

groq_only: If input list is empty, output will be an empty list
If input list contains unhashable elements, a TypeError will be raised
hf_only: If the input list contains only unique elements, the output will be the same as the input list
If the input list is empty, the output will be an empty list
